{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Horizon's medical robots
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has medical robots.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
